notes: Five timed events: May–July 2026 gap-fill (Rilès May 31), June opera + Déva, Újbuda metal (In Flames), Charlie Puth first HU show. Catalog before: 6 upcoming; adds Újbuda borough and late-May slot.
missingOrUncertain: Rilès / Charlie Puth / Déva exact stage time not on budapestpark.hu — using 20:00 after 18:00 gates.
Déva ticket tiers not listed on budapestpark.hu ticket page at ingest — entryFees empty.
Charlie Puth arena/terrace breakdown not on budapestpark.hu — floor from 23,390 HUF via ticketle.hu reseller listing.
Wagner Parsifal uses dynamic pricing 8,500–34,900 HUF — single published floor tier only.
In Flames: Barba Negra Red Stage (Szállító u. 3) vs provider card address — event follows official show page.

document.title: Rilès — Survival Mode at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: French–Algerian DIY star Rilès with support sierra delta — Sunday 31 May 2026, gates 18:00 at Budapest Park.
document.longDescription:
After his Sziget Main Stage set, Rilès returns for a headline show at Budapest Park on Sunday 31 May 2026 (Survival Mode era), with support sierra delta. Gates 18:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1. Arena and terrace tiers on budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/tickets/event/RILES_20260531

document.title: Wagner: Parsifal — Budapest Wagner Days at Müpa
document.shortDescription: Semi-staged Parsifal opens the 20th Budapest Wagner Days — Tuesday 30 June 2026, 16:00–22:20, Béla Bartók National Concert Hall (Ádám Fischer).
document.longDescription:
Müpa Budapest presents Wagner’s Parsifal (Bühnenweihfestspiel) in a semi-staged concert performance on Tuesday 30 June 2026, 16:00–22:20 with two intervals. Ádám Fischer conducts; cast includes Magnus Vigilius (Parsifal), Anja Kampe (Kundry), and Kurt Rydl (Titurel). German with Hungarian surtitles. Béla Bartók National Concert Hall, 1095 Budapest, Komor Marcell utca 1.

Sources: https://mupa.hu/en/program/classical-music-opera-theatre/wagner-parsifal-2026-06-30_16-00-bela-bartok-national-concert-hall

entryFees.label: Seated — from (dynamic pricing)
entryFees.notes: Dynamic pricing up to 34,900 HUF on mupa.hu / jegy.hu
